channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - aftermath.site
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for aftermath.site

item.title: Sick, A New Game About Killing Nazis
item.content:encoded:
The trailer for upcoming game Nekome: Nazi Hunter satisfies my thirst for Nazi blood.

Published: June 10, 2026, 1:21 pm

Last updated: June 10, 2026, 2:20 pm

Are you the kind of person who keeps rewatching the part of X-Men: First Class where Magneto kills a bunch of Nazis in Argentina? Have I got a trailer for you.

Nekome: Nazi Hunter is an upcoming game that is exactly what it sounds like. You will play as Vano Nastasu, a Romani man whose family was killed by Nazis. In 1941, he travels to Nazi-occupied Europe to hunt them.

Game director Jeronimo Barrera said that the game is designed around “meaningful combat and the strategic orchestration of violence,” in a press release from developer ProbablyMonsters. These are great descriptors for a game about hunting down and killing Nazis. Personally, I can’t wait to see how well the game brings this vision to reality.

The game does not yet have a release date but is expected to come out in early 2027. Between then and now, I’ll probably watch Magneto kill a bunch of Nazis in an Argentinian bar dozens of times.



https://aftermath.site/nekome-nazi-hunter-trailer-probablymonsters/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
